tagline: Now in Beta for low-latency analytics.
what_it_does: Lakehouse Real-Time (Lakehouse//RT) is a serverless SQL warehouse designed for low-latency, high-concurrency workloads, enabling sub-second SQL read queries against Unity Catalog tables. It supports Delta Lake and Apache Iceberg formats, allowing users to serve analytical data to applications, run operational analytics, and power dashboards for hundreds to thousands of concurrent users. Users can create and manage Lakehouse//RT similarly to other SQL warehouses, with specific permissions assigned to users.
why_it_matters: This feature significantly enhances the ability to deliver real-time analytics, improving decision-making speed and operational efficiency. Organizations can leverage Lakehouse//RT to support high-demand applications and BI dashboards, ultimately driving better insights and responsiveness to business needs. The serverless nature reduces infrastructure management overhead, allowing teams to focus on data insights rather than system maintenance.

capabilities.title: Sub-Second Query Performance
capabilities.desc: Delivers sub-second latency on SQL read queries for high-concurrency scenarios.

capabilities.title: Serverless Architecture
capabilities.desc: Eliminates the need for infrastructure management, allowing for automatic scaling.

capabilities.title: Unity Catalog Integration
capabilities.desc: Queries data exclusively from Unity Catalog, ensuring optimized performance with managed tables.

capabilities.title: Monitoring and Management
capabilities.desc: Provides comprehensive monitoring tools for query history and performance metrics.

prerequisites: Must be in a supported region.
Lakehouse//RT Beta must be enabled in your workspace.
use_cases: Running operational analytics for immediate insights.
Powering BI dashboards for high user concurrency.
Executing low-latency queries on large datasets.
limitations: Does not support write operations or DDL commands.
Only ANSI-compliant read queries are supported.
Certain table types and SQL functions are not supported.
Legacy Thrift protocol connections are not allowed.

steps.title: Enable Lakehouse//RT
steps.desc: Workspace admins can enable the Lakehouse//RT Beta in the workspace menu under Previews.

steps.title: Create SQL Warehouse
steps.desc: Navigate to Compute > SQL Warehouses and select 'Create SQL Warehouse'.

steps.title: Select Real-Time Type
steps.desc: Choose 'Real-Time' as the warehouse type during creation.

steps.title: Assign Permissions
steps.desc: Grant appropriate permissions to users and groups for warehouse access.

steps.title: Monitor Activity
steps.desc: Use the monitoring page to track query throughput and performance.

key_takeaway: Lakehouse Real-Time empowers organizations to achieve real-time analytics with sub-second query performance, enhancing decision-making and operational efficiency.
